titleStmt.title: SII 4.1140: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1140. (A.R. No. 276 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The beginning of this inscription must evidently be on the last ruhapatranētraḥ . tanōdviśālammanōharammaṇḍavamiṁdumaulēḥ . vītatrāsāmalarucicayōdbhāsitāśāvakāśai¨rnnānāratnaiḥ makarōdgōlakaṁ ccāpi
yaṁ . sanniṣkāṇāṁ guṇamaṇikhaniḥ paṁccasaṁkhya srai¨rddākṣārāmē vihitavasatē¨rbhīmanāthāsya śaṁbhōḥ . dākṣārāmapurē purā kṣitibhṛtāmā[¨r]yō babhūvēha yastasmādutthitapaṁccaviṁśatima
hanniṣkāṇi bhūpāgraṇīḥ . pratyabdaṁ damanōtsavē diśadbhīmāya kāmadviṣē sōyaṁ goṁkkamahīpatissitamati¨rbhbhūdēvacintāmaṇiḥ . śrībhīmēśvaradēvasya kōṣṭhāgāraṁ ca maṇḍapaṁ . ni¨rmmāpya dvā
radāsaṁ ca prādā dgoṁkkanarādhipaḥ . śakava¨rṣa 105 nēṇṭi saṁvatsara 16 gu śrāhiṁ ga¨rkkāṭaka saṁkrāṁttinimittamu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara velanāṇṭi śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍagoṁkkarāju śribhīmēśvaramahādēvara
kuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍa va¨rttilōhadaṇḍudi 20 ṇṭiki bhōlu naluvuraṁ būṇṭagā modaliAḍapuna nāvabōlaphrōlani Aḍapuna rāmanabijji vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 Ī Aḍapu mrāṇibhōla Eṟiyani vasamunaṁ
beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 caipaEṟiyabōla ka(ṁ)ṇṭa munaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 Ī Aḍapa bhīmabōla Ayiti vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 Ī Aḍapa ciṁttabōla rēvani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu
50 Ī Aḍapuna nabōla nāri vasamuna nupa Eḍlu 25 berasi diviyalu 5 Ara 1 reṇḍavu kāṭabōla mārani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina Inupa Eḍlu 50 Ī Aḍapa Eṟiya
nupa Eḍlu kētani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍu 50 Ī Aḍapa pālabōla prōlani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 Ī Aḍapa kā The continuation is in No. 1142 below.
Digital edition of SII 4.1140 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
